name: loaded_column
description: Loaded from charts_basic.xlsx and rendered through chart-render: Quarterly Sales by Product (2 series).
expectation: A clustered column chart titled 'Quarterly Sales by Product' with 2 series drawn side-by-side within each of four quarters (Q1-Q4), distinct colors matching a legend, a readable numeric value axis, and axis titles. Rendered FROM data parsed out of an .xlsx. Non-blank, no clipping.

name: loaded_line
description: Loaded from charts_basic.xlsx and rendered through chart-render: Sales Trend by Product (2 series).
expectation: A multi-series line chart titled 'Sales Trend by Product' with 2 straight-segment lines over four quarters on one shared numeric value axis, dot markers, distinct colors matching a legend, and axis titles. Rendered FROM data parsed out of an .xlsx. Non-blank.

name: loaded_pie
description: Loaded from charts_basic.xlsx and rendered through chart-render: Quarterly Totals (1 series).
expectation: A pie chart titled 'Quarterly Totals' divided into four wedges in DISTINCT colors (one per quarter), on-slice percentage labels, and a legend mapping each quarter to its slice. Rendered FROM data parsed out of an .xlsx. Non-blank, no clipping.
